name: python3-imagesize
title: python3-imagesize
summary: Python module for getting image size or DPI
description:
Python module for getting image size or DPI
This module parses image header and returns width and height of the
image, or dots per inch. Supported formats are: BMP, PNG, JPEG, JPEG2000,
GIF, TIFF, SVG, Netpbm, WebP, AVIF, HEIC/HEIF.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-imagesize because Python module for getting image size or DPI.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-imagesize as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-imagesize with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-imagesize --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
